Q:What is the initial password if the fingerprint lock is restored to the factory setting?
A: Initial password is "123456"#
Q:How to do if the lock run out of the battery?
A:Use the power bank to connect the USB port to charge then use of use the key toopen the door.
Q:How to do if you forget the password?
A:Use the fingerprint or key to unlocked the door and then restore the factory settingsto reset the password.
